name: Yukie | Employee's Wife Netori

1/???

It all goes downhill from here...

Ah yes the fated ntr series. Yes I've made sure that they don't have a child. Yes I've made sure the user is above 18. And yes I've removed plenty of other stuffs from the original doujinshi. Anyway have fun, if you read this then you already know who's next on the list.

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.
